test.command: source .env && clj -M:test (with LD_LIBRARY_PATH for NVIDIA libs)

typecheck.command: N/A (Clojure is dynamically typed, no typecheck validator)

appliedUpdates.description: Added 'Centralized SHA-256 Hashing' section to architecture.md documenting that all SHA-256 operations must use promptbench.util.crypto namespace (sha256-string, sha256-file, sha256-id). Prevents future workers from duplicating SHA-256 code.

suggestedGuidanceUpdates.suggestion: Add to Architecture Decisions: 'SHA-256 hashing: All SHA-256 operations must use promptbench.util.crypto namespace. Do not create local java.security.MessageDigest instances.'
suggestedGuidanceUpdates.evidence: Feature misc-transforms-polish centralized SHA-256 from 4 duplicated locations into promptbench.util.crypto. Without AGENTS.md guidance, future workers may not discover this namespace and re-introduce duplication.

suggestedGuidanceUpdates.suggestion: Add to Testing & Validation: 'MT tests require PROXY_AUTH_TOKEN from .env file. Run tests with `source .env && clj -M:test` or the full command from services.yaml. Without .env, the 4 MT proxy tests will ERROR (not fail).'
suggestedGuidanceUpdates.evidence: Test suite shows 4 errors when PROXY_AUTH_TOKEN is not set (mt-tier1-languages-test, mt-output-validity-test, mt-sends-temperature-zero-and-seed-test, mt-metadata-contains-provenance-test). The services.yaml test command does not source .env, making this a recurring CI/scrutiny trap.

rejectedObservations.observation: stages.clj uses def ^:private aliases for crypto functions instead of direct qualified calls
rejectedObservations.reason: Style inconsistency is minor and non-functional. The private aliases work correctly and the pattern is self-documenting. Not worth a fix feature.

rejectedObservations.observation: sha256-bytes could be made private (defn-) since it's only used internally in crypto.clj
rejectedObservations.reason: API surface concern is minor. Keeping it public doesn't cause harm and may be useful for future consumers. Premature restriction.

rejectedObservations.observation: tier2-mt-idempotent-test only checks variant count and IDs, not text content
rejectedObservations.reason: variant-id is derived from text content (deterministic hash), so ID equality implicitly guarantees text equality. The test is sufficient.
